reviews.comment:
Precios razonables, buena atención, pero algo lenta. Cuentan con lavadero, cocheras, elevador para reparaciones, un kiosoko café y baños. Acceso con silla de ruedas, y cobro con tarjetas y codigo qr

(Translated by Google)
Reasonable prices, good service, but a bit slow. They have a car wash, parking, a repair lift, a coffee kiosk, and restrooms. Wheelchair accessible, and they accept card and QR code payments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16461763455653012667/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5OC1fdE5REAE
